providers.name: AWS (p5.48xlarge)
providers.footnote: Standard On-Demand rate (US-East-1). Includes UltraCluster InfiniBand-equivalent fabric.

providers.name: GCP (A3-High)
providers.footnote: Reflects mid-2025 price reduction on A3 on-demand. Spot pricing (~40% reduction) excluded for BF16 steady-state consistency.

providers.name: CoreWeave HGX
providers.footnote: Premium bare-metal HGX with dedicated InfiniBand fabric. No multi-tenant contention. Rate reflects reserved cluster pricing.

providers.name: Lambda H100
providers.footnote: No published egress fee—bandwidth caps apply at scale. Production throttling documented for TB-scale transfers.

providers.name: Nutanix AHV (H100)
providers.footnote: Includes AOS/AHV licenses. Rate reflects 36-mo CapEx amortization + baseline 20% OpEx Adder.

providers.name: Cisco UCS M7 (H100)
providers.footnote: High-density thermal optimized C240 M7 configuration. Rate reflects 36-mo CapEx amortization + baseline 20% OpEx Adder.
